description: Run workflow action (run-workflow/action.yml) - verifies workflow start, ID and URL extraction

tests.name: workflowlog_has_id_key
tests.description: Verify workflowlog.yml contains the id key

tests.name: workflowlog_id_is_numeric
tests.description: Verify id value inside workflowlog.yml is a valid positive integer

tests.name: workflow_id_env_is_numeric
tests.description: Verify extracted WORKFLOW_ID env var is a valid positive integer greater than zero

tests.name: workflow_url_env_set
tests.description: Verify WORKFLOW_URL env var is set and starts with https://

tests.name: data_file_created
tests.description: Verify workflow data file was created in /tmp by run-workflow action

tests.name: debusine_work_request_exit_code
tests.description: Verify workflow/work-request exists on server (exit code 0)
